creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-RT-Authen-ExternalAuth,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/131425 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131425
> 

Unfortunately this isn't quite right: RT-A-EA 0.08 is not compatible with 
RT 3.6, which needs to stick with RT-A-EA 0.05.  I've also been expecting
the release of RT-A-EA 0.09 Real Soon Now -- according to a post by
the Author of RT-A-EA on the rt-users list on 26th Jan there was a 'high
priority issue to be addressed'.

Given it has been 2 weeks since that came out, I will shortly file an update
which will give rt38 users  RT-A-EA 0.08 whilst sticking with 0.05 for rt36
users.

	Cheers,

	Matthew

-- 
Dr Matthew J Seaman MA, D.Phil.                   7 Priory Courtyard
